nasb.text: Israel served the Lord all the days of Joshua and all the days of the elders who survived Joshua, and had known all the deeds of the Lord which He had done for Israel.

esv.text: Israel served the Lord all the days of Joshua, and all the days of the elders who outlived Joshua and had known all the work that the Lord did for Israel.

cnv.text: 約書亞在世的日子，和約書亞死後，那些知道耶和華為以色列人所行的一切事的長老還在世的日子，以色列人都事奉耶和華。

ccb.text: 约书亚在世的时候，以色列人都事奉耶和华。他死后，在那些经历过耶和华奇妙作为的长老还健在期间，以色列人仍事奉耶和华。
